title: Figure 3 from: Zhou X, Habib K, Zeng W, Ren Y, Shen X, Kang J, Li Q (2024) Addition of three new species of Xylariomycetidae fungi on bamboo from Southern China. MycoKeys 109: 109-129. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.109.128020
author: Zhou, Xin

description: Figure 3 Amphibambusa aureae (GMB4550, holotype) A type material B ascoma immersed under the surface of host C cross-section of ascoma D, E longitudinal sections of ascomata F peridium G paraphyses H, I asci J a J+ subapical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent K–M ascospores N culture on PDA. Scale bars: 0.5 mm (C, D); 100 μm (E); 10 μm (F–M).
